summary: Iteration 2 focused on the two new features (Excel export + Duplicate CPQ). 11 new backend pytest tests + 21 existing regression tests = 32/32 backend PASSED. All 9 frontend flows verified via Playwright (dashboard export download, dashboard row duplicate dialog + submit + refresh, part-scoped export with part_no filter, part-page duplicate dialog, Enter-to-add, duplicate-name rejection, source==target rejection). No blocking issues found.

minor.issue: target_customers uses Pydantic Field(min_length=1), so an empty list returns 422 (Unprocessable Entity). The spec asked for 4xx which is satisfied, but frontend never sends an empty array (button is disabled), so this is a defensive-only path. Acceptable.
When both ?part_no and ?q are provided, part_no wins (q is ignored). Not a bug — sensible priority — but not documented.

issues: Recharts logs: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' warning fires on initial mount before ResponsiveContainer measures. Purely a console warning; chart renders correctly. Consider wrapping in a min-h container or gating LineChart on data length AND container ready.

action_items: (Optional) Wrap Recharts ResponsiveContainer with an explicit min-height to silence the width(-1)/height(-1) console warning on PartDetail.

(Optional) In duplicate endpoint, consider returning 400 with a clean message when all target_customers strip to blanks; currently returns 400 which is fine — just also happens to return 422 when array is [] (harmless).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~820 lines. Time to split into routers/ (auth, records, imports, exports) — file exceeds the 700-line threshold called out in iteration 1.
duplicate_cpq inserts up to (N targets × M source_rows) records in one insert_many. No upper bound. Consider capping targets (e.g. len(targets) <= 50) to prevent accidental massive clones.
_build_xlsx column-letter code uses chr(64+i) which only works up to i==26. Currently safe (10 headers) but fragile if columns grow. Use openpyxl.utils.get_column_letter instead.
Excel export applies percent number_format "0.00\%" — the backslash is unnecessary; openpyxl expects "0.00%". Works today but cosmetic.
ExportButton uses process.env at build-time via `API` from lib/api. Good — no hardcoded URL. credentials:'include' is correct for httpOnly cookie flow.
DuplicateCPQDialog: source==target check is case-insensitive (good) and de-dupes by exact string (good). Missing: trim on source check side — but sourceCustomer comes from DB so trimmed already.
Dashboard reload() after duplicate correctly refreshes both rows and stats. Nice.
No brute-force / rate-limiting still (flagged iter 1). Not a new-feature concern.
seed_data_creation: New feature tests create ~30 TEST_/TEST-DUP-* records under CPQ numbers TEST-DUP-CPQ-*, TEST-DUP-NEW-*, TEST-EXPORTPART-*. Records are not auto-cleaned in the new test file (feature verification data intentionally left; harmless — all rows are prefixed 'TEST-'). Frontend Playwright run also created 'Playwright Corp A' + 'Playwright Corp B' duplicates of the first dashboard row (visible in the final screenshot).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two backend test files now: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (21 tests — auth/CRUD/import/stats/users) and /app/backend/tests/test_export_duplicate.py (11 tests — export xlsx + duplicate CPQ). Run both with: cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/ -v. Frontend testIds: dashboard-export-btn, part-export-btn, duplicate-row-<id>, part-duplicate-<id>, duplicate-target-input, duplicate-add-target, duplicate-submit-button, duplicate-cancel-button, duplicate-remove-target-<i>, duplicate-new-cpq-number, duplicate-new-cpq-date. Excel files are validated by (a) content-type header, (b) 'PK' zip magic bytes, and (c) openpyxl.load_workbook parsing of returned bytes.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in the new features. Both Excel export (with q + part_no filters + auth guard + proper zip/xlsx bytes) and Duplicate CPQ (with new_cpq_number/date overrides, empty-target rejection, missing-source 404, source==target frontend guard, Enter-to-add, duplicate-name rejection) work exactly as specified. All 11 new tests + 21 regression tests + 9 UI flows pass. Only observations are cosmetic (Recharts width warning, server.py length > 700).
